scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm -w @catan/server run dev" "npm -w @catan/client run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @catan/shared run build && npm -w @catan/client run build && npm -w @catan/server run build
scripts.test: npm -w @catan/shared run test && npm -w @catan/server run test
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @catan/shared exec tsc -- --noEmit && npm -w @catan/server exec tsc -- --noEmit && npm -w @catan/client exec tsc -- --noEmit
scripts.gate: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
